prompt: Reimagine the flower icon as a vibrant infographic, highlighting five stages of plant growth with vivid colors and labels.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to transform the simple flower icon into a vibrant infographic. The infographic should visually represent five distinct stages of plant growth, starting from a seed and culminating in the blooming flower from image 1. Utilize vivid colors and clearly legible labels for each of the five stages.
objects: Visual representation of a young plant
Visual representation of a plant with a bud
Visual representation of a blooming flower (as seen in image 1)
Text label for the seed stage
Text label for the seedling stage
Text label for the young plant stage
Text label for the budding stage
Text label for the blooming flower stage
